events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess field condition: missing check valve causing gravity flow. Work stage tested/inspected. Component condition installed-defective. Compare against manufacturer manuals/hydronics references. Missing check valve is non-compliant and defective. Decision fail because non-compliant (gravity flow can cause overheating, inefficiency, etc). Risk maybe medium/high? Missing check valve causing gravity flow in boiler/pump piping: can cause unwanted thermosiphon, boiler overheating, pump damage, energy waste. Risk high? In hydronics, check valve required to prevent reverse flow/gravity circulation. If missing, can cause boiler to overheat or short cycling. Could be high. But not critical like gas leak. Let's choose high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: check valve omitted per design; gravity circulation observed; reverse flow protection absent. Actions: install correct check valve per OEM/drawing; verify flow direction; test pump operation and check for gravity flow. Rationale: manufacturer/hydronics design requires check valve to prevent gravity flow and protect boiler/pump; observed missing valve causing gravity flow, fails inspection. References: mfr manuals, hydronics references, maybe ASME? But use provided. percent_complete maybe 90? Work tested/inspected stage. value not asked 0. sound etc default. order empty. workable empty. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose.
